$comment: C11/C23 6.4.5 / D-FFI-STDDEF-WCHAR-PE-WIDTH: sizeof(L"x"[0]) = the wchar_t element width, which is FORMAT-keyed — pe64 → 2 (UTF-16 unit), elf/mach-o → 4 (POSIX). Per-target exitCode overrides the manifest default: the ONE source witnesses the single wideCharCore() resolution across every target. The release arm returns the same constant per target.
